title: Tung Fort
tagline: Tung Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Tung Fort (or Kathingad; difficult fort in Marathi) is a hill fort in Pune District, India.

topPlaces.name: Pansoli
topPlaces.description: Pansoli is a village in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 65 ha (161 acres).

topPlaces.name: Malavandi Thule
topPlaces.description: Malavandi Thule is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 542 ha (1,339 acres).

topPlaces.name: Keware, Mawal
topPlaces.description: Keware is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 202 ha (499 acres).

topPlaces.name: Thakursai
topPlaces.description: Thakursai is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in the Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 264.22 ha (653 acres).

topPlaces.name: Dudhivare
topPlaces.description: Dudhivare is a village in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It encompasses an area of 340 ha (840 acres).

topPlaces.name: Pavana Lake
topPlaces.description: Pavana Lake, also known as Pavana Dam Reservoir and Pawna Lake, is a reservoir turned artificial lake in the Indian state of Maharashtra, formed by the Pavana Dam across the Pavana River in Pune district. The reservoir is 25 km from Lonavala and is increasingly getting popular as picnic and camping site for visitors from Pune and Mumbai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tung Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tung Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tung Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tung Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tung Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tung Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Tung Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tung Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pansoli, Malavandi Thule, Keware, Mawal, Thakursai, Dudhivare.
